DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-27-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Attorney Brian S. Healy (415)357-2093 for Bank of the West the moving party/Attorney Michael P. Rooney (415)533-0282 for Hanif Shaikh aka Henry the opposing party. Attorney Marc C. Forsythe (on Court Call) (949)798-2460 for Defendant DIVP Hospitality Vallejo, LLC the opposing party.

Hearing no opposition from either party the Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE COMPANY's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED with leave to amend to allege in good faith facts showing CAIRO, LLC's standing and duty owed to CAIRO, LLC. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Reported. (501)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-27-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Attorney Brian S. Healy (415)357-2093 for Bank of the West the moving party/Attorney Michael P. Rooney (415)533-0282 for Hanif Shaikh aka Henry the opposing party. Attorney Marc C. Forsythe (on Court Call) (949)798-2460 for Defendant DIVP Hospitality Vallejo, LLC the opposing party.

After hearing arguments from both parties in the matter of DEFENDANT BANK OF THE WEST'S JOINDER TO DIVP'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT, the Court's Ruling is as follows;
As to causes of action 1st and 3rd to address ripeness of these claims at the time of bankruptcy filing is OVERRULED.
Demurer is sustained with leave to amend as to causes 2nd, 4th, 5th, 6th and 8th to allege in good faith that distributions made by receiver to DIVP were made towards the debt owed under the Deed of Trust/Note. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge HArry M. Dorfman, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Reported. (501)
